TestCase z46Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_array2 = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_array2, t1.array2, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.array2 = follow_case_array2;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to process
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation: take square root of each non‑negative element and cast to int
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        if (follow_case.array2[i] >= 0) {
            follow_case.array2[i] = (int)sqrt((double)follow_case.array2[i]);
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
